brand.name: Quiver
brand.tagline: A crypto wallet built for everyone

hero.title: Crypto, in numbers you understand.
hero.subtitle: Always shown in your local currency. No blockchain knowledge required. 3 minutes to start.

f1.title: Always your local currency
f1.desc: See balances in TWD or USD — no mental math needed.

f2.title: Free transfers between users
f2.desc: Send money to friends with just an email — instant and free.

f3.title: We pay the gas fees
f3.desc: Withdraw to any wallet — we cover the on-chain fees.

naming.title: Why "Quiver"?
naming.subtitle: A quiver is the case archers use to hold their arrows.
naming.story: We think of each USDT in your wallet like an arrow. Quiver is YOUR case — keeping your assets organized, ready to deploy, and safely held.
naming.tagline: Your money isn't on some exchange or buried in some protocol — it's in your own Quiver.

painPoint.title: Why is crypto so painful in Taiwan?
painPoint.subtitle: We handle all the insider details so it feels as easy as Line Pay.
painPoint.p1Problem: USDT, TRC20, TRX, Wei, gwei — what does any of this mean?
painPoint.p1Solution: Quiver shows everything in NTD and translates blockchain jargon to plain language.
painPoint.p2Problem: Every transaction costs gas — beginners burn money learning
painPoint.p2Solution: Internal transfers are free; we cover gas fees on withdrawals.
painPoint.p3Problem: Self-custody private keys — lose them and your money is gone forever
painPoint.p3Solution: Sign in with Google. Keys protected with bank-grade encryption + Shamir cold backup.
painPoint.p4Problem: Want passive interest but DeFi is scary, and CEXes go bankrupt
painPoint.p4Solution: Quiver Earn (beta) connects to Bitfinex Funding & AAVE — funds stay in your account.

featuresMore.f4Desc: Full Traditional Chinese / English translations, dark mode follows your system.
featuresMore.f5Desc: TOTP 2FA, 24h cooldown whitelist, velocity limits on large withdrawals.
featuresMore.f6Desc: GDPR-compliant: data export, account deletion, login session management.

earn.title: Turn idle USDT into passive income
earn.subtitle: Quiver Earn connects your USDT to Bitfinex Funding (CeFi) and AAVE V3 (DeFi), tracking APY changes daily. Currently invite-only friends, no fees.
earn.step1Title: 1. You have your own Bitfinex account + USDT
earn.step1Desc: We hold zero user funds. Your USDT stays in your own Bitfinex Funding wallet.
earn.step2Title: 2. Give Quiver a read-only API key
earn.step2Desc: Encrypted with AES-GCM + KEK. Quiver can only read — no withdraw, no trade. Revoke anytime on Bitfinex.
earn.step3Desc: Watch Bitfinex Funding wallet balance, lent principal, earnings. Optional Polygon address for AAVE.
earn.step4Title: 4. You see the dashboard, you decide next
earn.step4Desc: Quiver doesn't make investment decisions for you. Read data, understand markets, choose your own moves.

h1.title: Real market rates
h1.desc: Bitfinex Funding lends USDT to margin traders, APY varies with market. AAVE V3 Polygon is pure on-chain lending, $1.2B TVL. Net APY beats Taiwan time deposit by 3-10x.

h2.title: Your money stays in your account
h2.desc: Funds always in YOUR Bitfinex / EVM wallet. Quiver is just a read-only dashboard, doesn't hold and can't withdraw.

h3.title: Free for friend tier
h3.desc: Invite-only friend tier pays no fees. Future commercial version will charge perf fee, but friend tier stays free forever.

h4.title: Hedged across CeFi + DeFi
h4.desc: Don't put all eggs in Bitfinex (CEX risk). Track AAVE (on-chain) too. If one fails, the other isn't affected.

h5.title: Historical trend tracking
h5.desc: Daily auto-snapshot. Dashboard shows 30-day APY trend, cumulative earnings. Tax season data is ready.

h6.title: Cross-friend APY ranking
h6.desc: Compare APY with other friends (opt-in) — see who has the best strategy and learn.

compare.row2Note: High APY, but Celsius / FTX precedents
compare.row3Note: Funds stay in your account, but 2-30 day lock

earn.disclaimer: Earn is invite-only beta tooling, NOT a regulated financial product. Quiver is not liable for any Bitfinex / DeFi protocol incidents. Past performance does not predict future results. Crypto is high risk — invest only what you can afford to lose.

roadmap.title: Product roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Not piling on features — doing each phase right before the next.
roadmap.r1Desc: USDT-TRC20 custodial wallet, KYC, withdrawals, gas sponsoring, hot/cold wallets, bilingual, dark mode, 2FA, audit log.
roadmap.r2Desc: Bitfinex Funding + AAVE V3 position tracking dashboard. Invite-only, max 10 friends, no fees.
roadmap.r3Desc: iOS + Android (Flutter). Full wallet features, Face ID, push notifications.
roadmap.r4Desc: After legal review, open public registration with auto-rebalance and perf fee.

trust.title: Why you can trust this
trust.subtitle: Not 'we promise' — but 'enforced by code and schema'.
trust.t1Desc: AES-256-GCM + 32-byte Master KEK + Shamir 5/3 cold backup. Keys never leave the host.
trust.t2Desc: All withdrawals require pre-approved whitelist + 24h wait. Even hijacked sessions can't steal funds.
trust.t3Desc: Every sensitive action (KYC, withdrawals, settings) is logged in append-only audit_logs.
trust.t4Desc: Earn's Bitfinex API keys can't withdraw, trade, or transfer. Architecturally impossible to steal funds.
trust.t5Desc: 03:00 daily auto-reconciliation: on-chain balance vs ledger. Drift > 0.01 USDT triggers alert.

ctaFinal.title: Start with a free account
ctaFinal.subtitle: Wallet is free forever. Earn beta is invite-only — contact us.

login.title: Welcome back to Quiver
login.subtitle: Sign in with Google to manage your digital assets
login.termsNote: By signing in, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy

errors.oauth_failed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
errors.email_unverified: Your Google email is not verified.

nav.adminModeBanner: ADMIN MODE — actions affect platform / user funds

dashboard.phaseNotice: Phase 2 — Complete identity verification (KYC) to unlock wallet features.

walletCard.title: Wallet operations
walletCard.desc: Receive, send, withdraw — pick one to open the wallet page.

balance.title: Balance
balance.desc: Your spendable USDT (TRC20) balance. Pending deposits take ~1 minute to confirm.
balance.noActivity: No activity yet — try the wallet operations above.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage your devices, export your data, request account deletion.

security.sessionsDesc: Showing up to 50 recent logins. If you see an unfamiliar device, sign out of all others immediately.
security.confirmRevokeOthers:
Sign out all devices except this one?

Other devices will be immediately signed out and need to log in again.

account.title: Account
account.desc: Data export and account deletion (personal data law / GDPR).
account.exportDesc: Download a JSON file with your profile + transaction history (KYC photos excluded). Right granted by data protection law.
account.exportOk: Export started — your download should begin shortly.
account.exportFailed: Export failed, please try again later.
account.deleteDesc: After you request deletion, an admin reviews and verifies your balance is 0. For compliance, your transaction history is retained (but personal data is masked).
account.confirmDelete:
Confirm deletion request?

An admin will review. You can cancel any time before they finalize. Once finalized, this is irreversible.
account.deleteRequested: Deletion request submitted, pending admin review.
account.pendingNotice: Deletion requested at {date}, waiting for admin to process.

transfer.title: Send
transfer.desc: Transfer USDT to anyone by email. Internal transfers are free.

confirm.title: Confirm transfer
confirm.subtitle: This cannot be undone — double-check below.

transfer.twofaRequired: Enter your 6-digit 2FA code or 8-digit backup code

withdraw.title: Withdraw
withdraw.desc: Send USDT (TRC20) to an external Tron address. 1 USDT fee, on-chain gas paid by platform.

confirm.title: Confirm withdrawal
confirm.subtitle: This cannot be cancelled, please double-check.
confirm.largeNotice: Amounts ≥ 1000 USDT require admin review before broadcast
confirm.twofaHint: Open Google Authenticator / Authy and enter the current 6-digit code. Use a backup code if you can't access the app.

success.title: Withdrawal request created ✓
success.needsReview: Waiting for admin review before broadcast
success.needsReviewLarge: Large amount — waiting for admin review before broadcast
success.needsReviewVelocityCount: You've submitted multiple withdrawals in the past 24h — admin review required before broadcast
success.needsReviewVelocityAmount: Your 24h cumulative withdrawal amount is high — admin review required before broadcast

withdrawal.feePayerLow: Platform FEE_PAYER is temporarily low. Withdrawals are paused, please retry later.
withdrawal.twofaRequired: Enter your 6-digit 2FA code or 8-digit backup code
withdrawal.notInWhitelist: Whitelist-only mode is on. This address is not on your active whitelist.

wallet.pageDesc: Receive, send, withdraw — switch tabs above.
wallet.title: My receive address
wallet.desc: Share this address or QR. USDT goes directly to your Quiver account.
wallet.hint: Only accepts USDT on the TRON network (TRC20). When withdrawing from an exchange, select TRC20.

notReady.title: Wallet not ready
notReady.desc: System setup is incomplete. Please contact admin.

kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.subtitle: Complete verification to unlock withdrawals and transfers. All data is encrypted at rest.

step1.title: Basic info
step1.desc: Enter your legal name and ID number. Must match your document.

step2.title: ID photos
step2.desc: Upload front and back of your ID (jpg / png / webp, max 5MB).

step3.title: Selfie
step3.desc: Hold your ID and take a selfie. Both face and ID must be clearly visible.

step4.title: Review & submit
step4.desc: Once submitted, expect a response within 1 business day.
step4.notice: After submission, you can only edit data once your application is rejected by an admin.

approved.title: Identity verified
approved.subtitle: All Quiver features are now available.

pending.title: Under review
pending.subtitle: We've received your submission. You'll get an email once it's reviewed.

kyc.alreadySubmitted: You already have an active submission
kyc.fileFormatUnsupported: Unsupported format — use JPG / PNG / WebP

server.internalError: Something went wrong, please try again

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.invalidToken: Session expired, please sign in again
